name: TN Brain · 10 · HubSpot sync (stakeholders + deals, read-only)

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO run_logs (workflow,status,detail) VALUES ('hubspot_sync','ok', jsonb_build_object('deals', {{ $('Build upserts').first().json.deals }}, 'stakeholders', {{ $('Build upserts').first().json.stakeholders }}, 'companies', {{ $('Build upserts').first().json.companies }}));

parameters.content:
## HubSpot sync — read-only mirror
Weekdays 07:30: pipelines (stage-id → label map) → all deals + all contacts (paginated) → company names via batch read → idempotent upserts into `deals` + `stakeholders`.

**Account matching:** company name vs accounts; deals also fall back to the deal-name prefix ('HMRC - Dynamo' → HMRC), so it works even while the token lacks the companies scope (ask IT for crm.objects.companies.read — until then company_name stays NULL).

**Credential:** the same Header Auth 'HubSpot' credential as workflow 8 — select it on the 5 HTTP nodes.
Run db/2026-07_hubspot.sql BEFORE first run. NO write-back to HubSpot (banked pending client sign-off).
